texto: The past has given us much too many bad answers for us not to see that the mistakes were in the questions themselves. There is no need to choose between the fetishism of spontaneity and the organization control; between the "come one, come all" of activist networks and the discipline of hierarchy; between acting desperately now and waiting desperately for later; between bracketing that which is to be lived and experimented in the name of paradise that seems more and more like a hell the longer it is put off and flogging the dead horse of how planting carrots is enough to leave this nightmare.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a The Invisible Committee: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “The past has given us much too many bad answers for us not to see that the mistakes were in the q…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, french, politics pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.

texto: We have been expropriated from our own language by television, from our songs by reality TV contests, from our flesh by mass pornography, from our city by the police and from our friends by wage-labor.
explicacao: Citação de The Invisible Committee sobre temas ligados a amizade. “We have been expropriated from our own language by television, from our songs by reality TV conte…” articula amizade, anarchism, french em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como termino e french.

texto: The situation is like this: they hired our parents to destroy this world, and now they'd like to put us to work rebuilding it, and -- to add insult to injury -- at a profit.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a The Invisible Committee: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a negocios.
